.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(248, 243, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(240, 233, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(193, 139, 172, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(244, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(193, 139, 172, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(248, 243, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(250, 243, 241) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f8f3f2 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f8f3f2, color-mix(in srgb, #f8f3f2 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #f8f3f2 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#f8f3f2, color-mix(in srgb, #f8f3f2 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(248, 243, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(248, 243, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(111, 210, 194, 0.17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(220, 118, 167, 0.17) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(244, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(244, 235, 235) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(193, 139, 172, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(248, 243, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(201, 155, 184) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(248, 243, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(248, 243, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(240, 233, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(193, 139, 172, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(240, 233, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(240, 233, 228) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgb(250, 243, 241) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(250, 243, 241) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
